title: Nami Fights to Keep the Treasure
description: On pages 5–8, Nami’s obsession with treasure collides with Luffy’s blunt honesty and Buggy’s chaos.
scene: Nami tries to protect what she has stolen or earned, while the surrounding fight keeps pulling her deeper into the Straw Hats’ orbit.

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: I don't expect you to understand my feelings for this town!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WHAT'S THAT?! YOU TRYING TO BEAT ME...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: YOU DARE TO ORDER ME DOWN THERE!? DO YOU KNOW WHO YOU'RE TALKING TO?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can't die! Not before I get revenge!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Soon, I shall rule the grand line!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: AND ALL THE GLITTERING TREASURE WILL BE MINE!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ALL THE TREASURE IN THE WORLD! I'LL HAVE IT ALL, NOBODY ELSE!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: THIS MISERABLE, STINKING TOWN IS YOUR TREASURE, EH?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THEN BE GLAD YOU WON'T LIVE TO SEE WHAT I DO TO IT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: COME DOWN AND FIGHT LIKE A MAN!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: I won't let you wreck this town!!

summary: The part keeps Nami morally complicated: she is selfish, clever, and frightened, but also increasingly tied to Luffy and Zoro.
